body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320164141A5F409E2CCC5D051ECE4"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353262759575061300","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很有意思啊！南怀瑾先生把中国古代的谋略讲解得很透彻，还用了很多历史故事来辅助理解，让人受益匪浅。我特别喜欢他对《素书》的讲解，感觉就像是在看一部智谋大片。不过，我有点讨厌那些奸臣和小人，好在书里也教了我们怎么去辨别他们。就像书里说的“亲贤臣，远小人”，这句话真是说得太对了！总之，这是一本很值得一读的书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710085454,"group_id":"7147624187346029598","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7OS4tzUnXKr018xZBGi3mE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"996630437562025","user_name":"喜欢水螅的艾隆纳亚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"996630437562025","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7147624187346029598","book_info":{"abstract":"谋略，中国古代文化又称之为纵横之术、长短之术、勾距之术。为总结历史的经验，著名学者南怀瑾先生曾就中国古代谋略做过系统讲析，其讲记以“历史的经验”为名，由台湾老古文化事业公司于一九八五、一九八六年分两册出版。第一册撷取赵蕤《长短经》、刘向《战国策》、桓范《世要论》精华，参以历史上兴亡成败的实例，论述了治世、用人、防邪、辨奸之道。第二册是对《素书》《太公兵法》《阴符经》的逐句串讲。《素书》名为黄石公所传，张良辅佐刘邦，兴汉灭楚，兵机谋略，多得是书之助，张良之后，此书不知去向，至晋，有人盗张良墓，于玉枕处发现此书，始得再传于世。
本书重在其中经义的阐发，并将近一百五十则历史故事，铺注于原经文之后，供读者经史相参，从中悟得创业待人的道理。一九九〇年我社经作者和原出版单位授权，将《历史的经验》两册合为一册（分上、下编），以“历史上的智谋”为名，改排出版，以供研究。一九九二年恢复原名再版。
兹经版权方台湾老古文化事业公司授权，将老古公司二〇〇九年一月版校订出版，以供研究。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a59a162d239608c22164c1329ddb3d8a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"南怀瑾 著述","author_id":"","book_id":"7147624187346029598","book_name":"历史的经验","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e0d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7475665144870079513","read_count":"236","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"149285"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"10","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a59a162d239608c22164c1329ddb3d8a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180101&x-signature=Y1ogji7FjejzmZ52FYNX5mywfEU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320164141A5F409E2CCC5D051ECE4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20760,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1183},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7361287792243671833","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书很好，特别值得看看对历史有新的认知和理解，对自己有很高的觉悟和提高"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713936169,"group_id":"7147624187346029598","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/20uF9TfsHGkclTtANE857f4Ad/SpBgJdVmt1392IQn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byte
